name: Crunch Cereal
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix rolled oats, wheat germ, coconut or sunflower seeds, nuts, and raisins in a large bowl.
Mix oil, honey, and vanilla. Pour over rolled oat mixture. Stir until evenly mixed.
Spread mixture on a 15- by 10- by 1-inch baking pan.
Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
Cool. Break up any large lumps.
Store in an airtight container.
Calories per half cup serving: About 280 with coconut; 290 with sunflower seeds.
